allow: Bash(git commit -m "fix: remove non-existent @radix-ui/react-slot@^2.0.0 from dependencies:*)
Bash(git commit -m "fix: correct CSS import path in main.tsx \(input.css not index.css\):*)
Bash(git commit -m "fix: syntax error in QuizPage computed property assignment:*)

Bash(Rscript -e "pkgs <- c\(''ggplot2'',''ggiraph'',''jsonlite'',''htmlwidgets''\); missing <- pkgs[!pkgs %in% installed.packages\(\)[,''Package'']]; if\(length\(missing\)\) { cat\(''Installing:'', paste\(missing, collapse='', ''\), ''\\n''\); install.packages\(missing, repos=''https://cloud.r-project.org'', quiet=TRUE\) } else cat\(''All packages already installed\\n''\)")

Bash(Rscript -e "pkgs <- c\(''ggplot2'',''ggiraph'',''jsonlite'',''htmlwidgets''\); installed <- pkgs[pkgs %in% installed.packages\(\)[,''Package'']]; cat\(''Installed:'', paste\(installed, collapse='', ''\), ''\\n''\)")
